description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:3-jdk-8 Docker image and defines a single stage named build. Add a job called build in the build stage that runs the command mvn package -q -DskipTests. Configure the job to collect the generated JAR files from service-registry/target/*.jar, config-server/target/*.jar, admin-server/target/*.jar, cloud-gateway/target/*.jar, portfolio-service/target/*.jar, and experience-service/target/*.jar as artifacts. No caches, services, variables, or conditional rules are required.
